name: research-data-platform
description: Research data platform suite for ML/AI research divisions running on Kubernetes: author and validate data contracts (ODCS) for training and eval datasets, design dataset QoS SLOs, review datasets against data-product criteria (DAUTNIVS), right-size data governance for research velocity, design the dataset catalog/knowledge layer for human and agent discovery, and architect the lakehouse storage substrate (Iceberg-class table formats on MinIO/S3) with training-run reproducibility. Built for the knowledge layer of an Agentic Developer Portal.
